questionHtml:
Magnetite, Fe3O4, is another ore of iron that contains both Fe2+ and Fe3+.

Iron exists as several isotopes.

State the type of spectroscopy that could be used to determine their relative abundances.

meta.title: State the type of spectroscopy that could be used to determine their relative abundances.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 1. Models of the particulate nature of matter

Structure 1.2.3—Mass spectra. Mass spectra are used to determine the relative atomic masses of elements from their isotopic composition. Interpret mass spectra in terms of identity and relative abundance of isotopes.
